title: bassia ramiflora
intro: Bassia ramiflora, also known as Prickly Lettuce or Prickly Chrysanthemum, is a flowering plant species native to China, Korea, and parts of Russia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Bassia ramiflora are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Bassia ramiflora include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are used to treat a range of ailments, from digestive issues to respiratory problems.
